name: orchestrator
description: Skill-first orchestration framework. Dispatch agents, verify deliverables, improve with every cycle.

settings.name: Board Provider
settings.description: Your issue tracker: linear, github, notion, or jira

settings.description: Apollo.io API key for sales verification (optional)
